title: A person who taught you something
questions: Describe a person who taught you something useful. You should say: who this person is, what they taught you, how they taught you, and explain why this was useful.

title: A friend you enjoy spending time with
questions: Describe a friend you enjoy spending time with. You should say: who this person is, how you met, what you do together, and explain why you enjoy their company.

title: A time you solved a difficult problem
questions: Describe a time when you solved a difficult problem. You should say: what the problem was, when it happened, how you solved it, and explain how you felt.

title: A competition you took part in
questions: Describe a competition you took part in. You should say: what it was, when it was, who you competed with, and explain how you felt about it.

title: A time you helped someone
questions: Describe a time when you helped someone. You should say: who you helped, what the situation was, how you helped them, and explain how you felt.

title: A place where you go to relax
questions: Describe a place where you go to relax. You should say: where it is, how often you go, what you do there, and explain why it helps you relax.

title: A city you want to visit
questions: Describe a city you would like to visit. You should say: where it is, how you know about it, what you would do there, and explain why you want to visit.

title: A piece of technology you find useful
questions: Describe a piece of technology you find useful. You should say: what it is, when you got it, how you use it, and explain why you find it useful.

title: A book that influenced you
questions: Describe a book that influenced you. You should say: what the book is, when you read it, what it was about, and explain how it influenced you.

title: A skill you learned recently
questions: Describe a skill you learned recently. You should say: what the skill is, why you learned it, how you learned it, and explain how it has helped you.

title: A goal you want to achieve
questions: Describe a goal you want to achieve in the future. You should say: what it is, when you want to achieve it, what you need to do, and explain why it's important to you.

title: A project you completed successfully
questions: Describe a project you completed successfully. You should say: what the project was, when you did it, how you completed it, and explain how you felt when it was done.

title: A person who inspires you
questions: Describe a person who inspires you. You should say: who they are, how you know them, what they do, and explain why they inspire you.

title: A time you stayed up late
questions: Describe a time when you stayed up late. You should say: when it was, why you stayed up, what you did, and explain how you felt the next day.

title: A place where you studied
questions: Describe a place where you studied. You should say: where it was, when you studied there, what it looked like, and explain how you felt about studying there.

title: Something you do to keep healthy
questions: Describe something you do to keep healthy. You should say: what it is, how often you do it, how you started, and explain why you think it keeps you healthy.

title: A photo you remember well
questions: Describe a photo you remember well. You should say: when it was taken, what is in the photo, what happened when it was taken, and explain why you remember it.

title: A decision that was difficult to make
questions: Describe a decision that was difficult for you to make. You should say: what it was, when you made it, what options you had, and explain why it was difficult.

title: An achievement you are proud of
questions: Describe an achievement you are proud of. You should say: what it was, when it happened, how you achieved it, and explain why you are proud of it.

title: A person who is good at their job
questions: Describe a person who is good at their job. You should say: who they are, what their job is, how you know them, and explain why you think they are good at it.

title: A place that is special to you
questions: Describe a place that is special to you. You should say: where it is, how you first went there, what you do there, and explain why it is special to you.

title: An app you use often
questions: Describe an app you use often. You should say: what it is, when you started using it, what you use it for, and explain why you use it so often.

title: A time you learned from a mistake
questions: Describe a time you learned from a mistake. You should say: what the mistake was, when it happened, what you did about it, and explain what you learned.

title: A hobby you would like to start
questions: Describe a hobby you would like to start. You should say: what it is, why you want to start it, how you would learn it, and explain what benefits it would bring you.

title: A time you worked in a team
questions: Describe a time you worked in a team. You should say: what the task was, who the team members were, what your role was, and explain how you felt about working in that team.

title: A quiet place you like to go
questions: Describe a quiet place you like to go. You should say: where it is, how you found it, what you do there, and explain why you like this quiet place.

title: Something you want to learn in the future
questions: Describe something you want to learn in the future. You should say: what it is, why you want to learn it, how you plan to learn it, and explain how it will help you.

title: A family member you admire
questions: Describe a family member you admire. You should say: who they are, what they do, how they have influenced you, and explain why you admire them.
